---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for OpenClaw.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the opportunity you see.

## Use case

Who would benefit from this feature? Describe the scenario:

- As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Proposed solution

What would you like OpenClaw to do? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why is your proposed solution preferred?

## Impact

Which components would this affect?

- [ ] Gateway / API
- [ ] Job pipeline
- [ ] Agent routing
- [ ] Channel integration (Slack, Telegram, etc.)
- [ ] Job Viewer / Mission Control UI
- [ ] MCP tools
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, mockups, or related issues.
